scripts.check:version-policy: npm run check:version && npm run check:changeset
scripts.lint: npm run lint:package && npm run lint:size && eslint . && npm run lint:cycles && npm run lint:dead && npm run lint:types
scripts.ci: npm run check:version-policy && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:acceptance-coverage && npm run test:cov && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-content-script.mjs && node scripts/build-service-worker.mjs && node scripts/build-gallery-page.mjs && node scripts/build-destination-pages.mjs && node scripts/copy-extension-assets.mjs && node scripts/check-version-policy.mjs --artifacts-only --build-info
scripts.build:release: IMAGE_TRAIL_RELEASE_BUILD=1 npm run build && node scripts/check-version-policy.mjs --artifacts-only --build-info --require-build-mode=release
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:compile && npm run test:unit:run
scripts.test:dom: npm run test:compile && npm run test:dom:run
scripts.test:run: npm run test:unit:run && npm run test:dom:run
scripts.test:cov: npm run typecheck && npm run test:compile && c8 --clean=true --check-coverage=false --reporter=none npm run test:unit:run && c8 --clean=false npm run test:dom:run
scripts.test:stories:ci: npm run build:storybook && concurrently -k -s first -n SB,TEST "http-server storybook-static --port 6006 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6006 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006"
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:compile && npm run test:run
